metadata.description: OpenClaw plugins by Alejandro Quintanar — browser automation, terminal emulation, privilege elevation, and agent utilities

plugins.name: browser39
plugins.description: Headless web browser for AI agents. Fetches pages as token-optimized markdown with JS support, forms, cookies, storage, and web search.

plugins.name: npcterm
plugins.description: Headless, in-memory terminal emulator for AI agents. Full ANSI/VT100 emulation with PTY spawning.

plugins.name: sudo39
plugins.description: Guarded privilege-elevation MCP server for AI agents. Run commands via sudo, pkexec, macOS admin prompt, or Windows UAC, gated by an allowlist policy.

plugins.name: memory39
plugins.description: Temporal-priority memory system for AI agents. Store and recall events, facts, people, and places with intelligent scoring (relevance + importance + recency).

plugins.name: repo39
plugins.description: Token-optimized repository explorer for AI agents. Directory trees, symbol maps, dependency parsing, git diffs, and content search.
